reply:
[[BLOCK:p_87]]
In 2024, invited as a special Service Design (A design discipline focused on improving service quality and user satisfaction.) expert for the Shanghai Healing Expo and delivered two independent speeches. The event attracted an audience of 100,000.

[[BLOCK:p_88]]
In 2024, independently developed the art therapy system "Heart Imagery Painting (心象画)" (A personalized art therapy approach to visualize and adjust personal energy states.), focusing on artistic expression: a personalized creation tailored just for you, serving as both your spiritual and artistic expression.

[[BLOCK:p_89]]
Based on individual psychology and key life events, the painting process reveals personal energy flow. It can be combined with psychology and traditional knowledge to adjust personal energy states.

[[BLOCK:p_90]]
In 2025, invited to participate in the Healing Conference Shanghai Expo, where "Heart Imagery Painting," "Spiritual Card Array" (A card system designed for personal development and spiritual guidance.), and "Five Elements Energy" (A concept based on traditional Chinese philosophy to balance energy through the five elements.) charging cards achieved massive sales, with over 5,000 transactions recorded on the same day.

[[BLOCK:p_92]]
In September 2025, at the China Trade in Services Conference, a community healing project was recognized as one of the top ten healing design cases of 2025 by the prestigious Guanghua Longteng Award in the design field. Additionally, due to nearly a decade of influential contributions in China, appointed as a member of the Service Design Engineer Committee and led the formulation of service design standards for the healing industry.

[[BLOCK:p_93]]
In October 2025, awarded the title of ESG Engineer (An engineer specializing in Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) practices.) by the World Green Design Organization and 28 senior ESG engineers in China. Presented the "Everyone is a Healer System" during the defense.

[[BLOCK:p_95]]
Publications

[[BLOCK:p_96]]
2017: Published "集创思维设计矩阵"

[[BLOCK:p_97]]
2024: Upcoming publication "Building Services, Igniting Conversion (构建服务，引爆转化)" (A methodology for designing services that drive customer conversions.)

[[BLOCK:p_98]]
2025: Upcoming publication "Life Design Blueprint (人生设计图谱)" (A framework for planning and designing a fulfilling life path.)
